message:
fix(db/cache): hold by_key lock during invalidate_agent_scoped to prevent dual-index desync (br-pf84h)

invalidate_agent_scoped previously dropped the agents_by_key write lock
before scanning and cleaning agents_by_id. A concurrent put_agent in
that window could insert into both indexes, and the stale scan would
then remove the freshly-inserted agents_by_id entry — leaving by_key
pointing to an agent that by_id doesn't have.

Fix: hold the agents_by_key write lock for the entire operation. Lock
ordering (rank 22 → 23) is respected. Also uses a single write lock on
agents_by_id (instead of read → release → write) for the scan+remove
path when id is unknown.

Adds two regression tests:
- invalidate_then_put_leaves_consistent_dual_index (sequential)
- concurrent_invalidate_put_dual_index_consistency (500-round threaded stress)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
